description: This photograph depicts a natural and semi-natural water course, identified in the document as belonging to class "8.1.1.0 Natural and semi-natural water Courses". The specific location of the depicted scene is Antalya Province, Southern Turkey. The image shows a rocky riverbed with shallow pools of water, surrounded by dense green shrubs and small trees along its banks. Gently sloping hills covered with sparse vegetation are visible in the background under a bright sky. A copyright notice "© M. Escobar 2008" is present in the lower-left corner of the image.
